session.user: Run `ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/objective/ src/erk/cli/commands/json/` and report results. Do NOT fix anything.
session.assistant: I'll run the ruff check command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/objective/ src/erk/cli/commands/json/
Check ruff linting for objective and json CLI commands

session.tool_result:
Exit code 1 F401 [*] `erk.cli.ensure.UserFacingCliError` imported but unused --> src/erk/cli/commands/objective/check/cli.py:13:28 | 11 | run_objective_check, 12 | ) 13 | from erk.cli.ensure import UserFacingCliError | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ 14 | from erk.cli.repo_resolution import resolved_repo_option 15 | from erk.core.context import ErkContext | help: Remove unused import: `erk.cli.ensure.UserFacingCliError`
Found 1 error. [*] 1 fixable with the `--fix` option.
session.assistant:
**ruff check failed: 1 issue found**
**File:** `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/objective/check/cli.py:13:28` **Rule:** F401 **Message:** `erk.cli.ensure.UserFacingCliError` imported but unused
The unused import can be fixed with `--fix` option, but per your instructions, I'm reporting only.
